title: Real Events
description: Real Events bring national holidays to life in the game, featuring exciting celebrations like a Christmas event, New Year's event, Easter event, and Halloween event!
body:
## Development

**Ongoing Updates**: This mod is a work in progress, and many exciting features are still on the way! Stay tuned for regular updates as we continue to expand and enhance the experience.

### Development Status

> ✅ **Implemented**  
> 🚧 **In Development**  
> ❌ **Not Implemented**  

| Event           | Status |
| --------------- | ------ |
| New Year        | 🚧    |
| Easter          | 🚧    |
| Halloween       | 🚧    |
| Christmas       | 🚧    |


## Description:

**Real Events** is a Fabric mod that transforms your Minecraft world by bringing national holidays to life! Immerse yourself in festive celebrations with in-game events tailored to occasions like Christmas, New Year's, Easter, and Halloween. Each event introduces themed decorations, activities, and surprises, adding a vibrant and joyous atmosphere to your gameplay experience. Celebrate the seasons and make your world more dynamic and festive!  

## Features:  

- **New Year's Event**:  
  - **Fireworks Spectacle**: Light up the sky with dazzling fireworks displays.  
  - **Countdown Clock**: Gather with friends and watch the clock strike midnight.  
  - **New Year’s Party Gear**: Don festive hats, noisemakers, and celebratory outfits.  
  - **Midnight Feasts**: Enjoy special food items like sparkling cider and cakes.  
  - **Lucky Charms**: Collect rare items to bring good fortune in the new year.  

 
- **Easter Event**:  
  - **Easter Egg Hunt**: Explore your world to find hidden eggs filled with surprises.  
  - **Springtime Mobs**: Encounter adorable, themed animals like bunnies and chicks.  
  - **Flower Crowns**: Craft beautiful accessories to wear during the event.  
  - **Chocolate Treats**: Enjoy edible chocolate bunnies and eggs for a sweet boost.  
  - **Easter Basket Crafting**: Create custom baskets to hold your treasures.  

 
- **Halloween Event**:  
  - **Spooky Decorations**: Adorn your world with jack-o’-lanterns, cobwebs, and haunted furniture.  
  - **Trick-or-Treating**: Visit villages for candy or encounter tricks from mobs.  
  - **Haunted Mobs**: Face off against ghostly creepers and skeletons.  
  - **Witch’s Cauldron**: Brew eerie potions with mysterious effects.  
  - **Costume Crafting**: Dress up in themed costumes like vampires or werewolves.  


- **Christmas Event**:  
  - **Candy Armor**: Stylish and sweet armor for the season.  
  - **Candy Canes**: Collect and enjoy these festive treats.  
  - **Presents**: Find gifts scattered around the world throughout December.  
  - **Special Event on December 25th**: Unlock exclusive rewards and surprises!  
  - **Christmas Trees**: Decorate your world with sparkling, customizable trees.
